headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录284篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究197篇, 开源项目45篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（70篇）。其中8%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ apache /ossie：Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata ac

▸ Nutlope /hallmark：Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

▸ PostHog /posthog：🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI obser

▸ openinterpreter /openinterpreter：A coding agent for low-cost models

▸ PrismML-Eng /Bonsai-demo：Bonsai Demo
text: 今日共收录284篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究197篇, 开源项目45篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（70篇）。其中8%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
